lines.gurmukhi: ਅਟਲ ਅਖਇਓ ਦੇਵਾ ਮੋਹਨ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: attal akheo devaa mohan alakh apaaraa |
lines.english: You are eternal and unchanging, imperishable, invisible and infinite, O divine fascinating Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨੁ ਪਾਵਉ ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੇਨੁ ਦਾਸਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੬॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: daan paavau santaa sang naanak ren daasaaraa |4|6|22|
lines.english: Please bless Nanak with the gift of the Society of the Saints, and the dust of the feet of Your slaves. ||4||6||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਆਘਾਏ ਸੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tripat aaghaae santaa |
lines.english: The Saints are fulfilled and satisfied;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਜਾਨੇ ਜਿਨ ਮੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur jaane jin mantaa |
lines.english: they know the Guru's Mantra and the Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee kichh kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: They cannot even be described;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਾਮ ਬਡਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kau naam baddaaee |1|
lines.english: they are blessed with the glorious greatness of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੁ ਅਮੋਲਾ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: laal amolaa laalo |
lines.english: My Beloved is a priceless jewel.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹ ਅਤੋਲਾ ਨਾਮੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: agah atolaa naamo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His Name is unattainable and immeasurable. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਿਗਤ ਸਿਉ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਮਾਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: avigat siau maaniaa maano |
lines.english: One whose mind is satisfied believing in the imperishable Lord God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਤ ਸਗਲ ਧਿਆਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: pekhat sagal dhiaano |
lines.english: He sees all in his meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿਓ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tajio man te abhimaano |2|
lines.english: He banishes egotistical pride from his mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh tat giaano |
lines.english: becomes Gurmukh and attains the essence of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਛਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur te mehal pachhaanaa |
lines.english: who, through the Guru, realize the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਠਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal tin kaa tthaanaa |
lines.english: Permanent is the place of those

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin gur mil jaage |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, they remain awake and aware night and day;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj samaadh subhaae |
lines.english: intuitively absorbed in Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: pooran tripat aghaae |
lines.english: They are perfectly fulfilled and satisfied,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ਹਾਥਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har bhanddaar haath aaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord's treasure comes into their hands;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਗੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kee sevaa laage |3|
lines.english: they are committed to the Lord's service. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੭॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak gur te paaeaa |4|7|23|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Guru, they attain it. ||4||7||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੬ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 ghar 6 dupade |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਵਖਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: avar sabh kichh mithiaa rasanaa raam raam vakhaan |1|
lines.english: Everything else is false; with your tongue, chant the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਸਗਲ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd sagal siaanapaa mil saadh tiaag gumaan |
lines.english: Abandon all your clever tricks; meet with the Holy, and renounce your egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਹਿ ਅਘ ਤੇਰੇ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਵਨੁ ਬਪੁਰੋ ਜਾਮੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mitteh agh tere janam janam ke kavan bapuro jaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The sins of your many past lifetimes shall be washed away; then, what can the wretched Messenger of Death do to you? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਕਰਨ ਸੁਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere man karan sun har naam |
lines.english: O my mind, with your ears, listen to the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਦੀਨ ਨ ਭਉ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਖ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dookh deen na bhau biaapai milai sukh bisraam |
lines.english: Pain, poverty and fear shall not afflict you, and you shall find peace and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬਖਾਨੈ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਨੁ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥੨॥੧॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad naanak bakhaanai har bhajan tat giaan |2|1|24|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, Nanak speaks; meditation on the Lord is the essence of spiritual wisdom. ||2||1||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਸੇ ਹੋਤ ਦੇਖੇ ਖੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa se hot dekhe kheh |
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the Naam, the Name of the Lord - I have seen them reduced to dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਬਿਲਾਸ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਤੂਟਤੇ ਏ ਨੇਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: putr mitr bilaas banitaa toottate e neh |1|
lines.english: The love of children and friends, and the pleasures of married life are torn apart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੂਖੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਦੇਹ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jalat naahee agan saagar sookh man tan deh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall not burn in the ocean of fire, and your mind and body shall be blessed with peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਲੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam nit nit leh |
lines.english: O my mind, continually, continuously chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਖ ਛਾਇਆ ਜੈਸੇ ਬਿਨਸਤ ਪਵਨ ਝੂਲਤ ਮੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: birakh chhaaeaa jaise binasat pavan jhoolat meh |
lines.english: Like the shade of a tree, these things shall pass away, like the clouds blown away by the wind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਮਿਲੁ ਸਾਧ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇਰੈ ਕਾਮਿ ਆਵਤ ਏਹ ॥੨॥੨॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: har bhagat drirr mil saadh naanak terai kaam aavat eh |2|2|25|
lines.english: Meeting with the Holy, devotional worship to the Lord is implanted within; O Nanak, only this shall work for you. ||2||2||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਸੁਖਹ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸਤੋ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: purakh pooran sukhah daataa sang basato neet |
lines.english: The perfect, primal Lord is the Giver of peace; He is always with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਬਿਆਪਤ ਉਸਨ ਨ ਸੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: marai na aavai na jaae binasai biaapat usan na seet |1|
lines.english: He does not die, and he does not come or go in reincarnation. He does not perish, and He is not affected by heat or cold. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam siau kar preet |
lines.english: O my mind, be in love with the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਿ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ਏਹ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chet man meh har har nidhaanaa eeh niramal reet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Within the mind, think of the Lord, Har, Har, the treasure. This is the purest way of life. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਜੋ ਜਪੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੀਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: kripaal deaal gopaal gobid jo japai tis seedh |
lines.english: Whoever meditates on the merciful compassionate Lord, the Lord of the Universe, is successful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵਲ ਨਵਤਨ ਚਤੁਰ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਮਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਬੀਧਿ ॥੨॥੩॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naval navatan chatur sundar man naanak tis sang beedh |2|3|26|
lines.english: He is always new, fresh and young, clever and beautiful; Nanak's mind is pierced through with His Love. ||2||3||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਭਜੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰ ਉਤਰਹਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: charan saran bhaj sang saadhoo bhav saagar utareh paar |1|
lines.english: Run to the Lord's lotus feet, and join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. Cross over the terrifying world-ocean, and reach the other side. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਤ ਬੈਸਤ ਸੋਵਤ ਜਾਗਤ ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਚਿਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: chalat baisat sovat jaagat gur mantru ridai chitaar |
lines.english: While walking and sitting, sleeping and waking, contemplate within your heart the GurMantra.
